name: paidproof
description: PaidProof — AI verifier agents release on-chain escrow the moment work is done. Bitcoin-secured freelance settlement built for OpenClaw Hack Toronto 2026.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n foreman,filespec,colorvision,aesthetic,dashboard -c yellow,cyan,magenta,blue,green "npm run dev:foreman" "npm run dev:researcher" "npm run dev:writer" "npm run dev:aesthetic" "npm run dev:dashboard"
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix shared run typecheck && npm --prefix agents/foreman run typecheck && npm --prefix agents/researcher run typecheck && npm --prefix agents/writer run typecheck && npm --prefix agents/aesthetic run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/dashboard run typecheck
